generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had to wait for local authorities to respond during emergencies? That's changing. New domestic security powers mean faster federal response teams can deploy immediately when your community needs them. Critics say it's about 'big government,' but in a crisis, who do you want showing up first? #CommunityFirst #SecurityMatters
